name: Workout sprint
description: Fast, direct songs for exercise, momentum, and high focus movement.
notes: Prioritize high energy and danceability. Avoid very acoustic tracks unless the user asks for them.

name: Deep study
description: Low-distraction music for coding, reading, homework, and concentration.
notes: Favor calmer moods, moderate tempo, and acoustic or ambient textures.

name: Commute reset
description: Steady songs for driving, public transit, or walking between tasks.
notes: Balance energy with mood fit so the result is not too sleepy or too intense.

name: Calm evening
description: Gentle songs for winding down, journaling, or recovering from a busy day.
notes: Favor peaceful, warm, relaxed, and acoustic songs.

name: Confidence boost
description: Songs that feel bold, upbeat, and socially energizing.
notes: Favor high valence, high danceability, and confident or euphoric moods.
